QMware announced a new collaboration with NVIDIA and Oracle.

interaction_phrase: NVIDIA A100 Tensor Core GPU clusters
occurrence_sentence: QMware, a leading hybrid quantum computing company that provides cloud services, today announced a new collaboration with NVIDIA and Oracle through which it will use Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) powered by NVIDIA A100 Tensor Core GPU clusters, as well as the NVIDIA CUDA Quantum open-source hybrid quantum computing platform, to test and develop a new state-of-the-art hybrid quantum computing service for enterprise customers.

interaction_phrase: NVIDIA CUDA Quantum open-source hybrid quantum computing platform
occurrence_sentence: QMware, a leading hybrid quantum computing company that provides cloud services, today announced a new collaboration with NVIDIA and Oracle through which it will use Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) powered by NVIDIA A100 Tensor Core GPU clusters, as well as the NVIDIA CUDA Quantum open-source hybrid quantum computing platform, to test and develop a new state-of-the-art hybrid quantum computing service for enterprise customers.

interaction_phrase: collaborations with partners such as NVIDIA
occurrence_sentence: McKinsey's latest Quantum Technology Monitor illustrates the rapid adoption and exploration of quantum technology – also reflected by QMware's recent collaborations with partners such as NVIDIA.

QMware, a leading hybrid quantum computing company that provides cloud services, today announced a new collaboration with NVIDIA and Oracle through which it will use [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/) powered by [NVIDIA ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/)[A100 ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/)[Tensor Core ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/)[GPU](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/) clusters, as well as the NVIDIA CUDA Quantum open-source hybrid quantum computing platform, to test and develop a new state-of-the-art hybrid quantum computing service for enterprise customers.

QMware, a leading hybrid quantum computing company that provides cloud services, today announced a new collaboration with NVIDIA and Oracle through which it will use [Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI)](https://www.oracle.com/cloud/) powered by [NVIDIA ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/)[A100 ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/)[Tensor Core ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/)[GPU](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/a100/) clusters, as well as the NVIDIA CUDA Quantum open-source hybrid quantum computing platform, to test and develop a new state-of-the-art hybrid quantum computing service for enterprise customers.
QMware announces collaboration with NVIDIA and Oracle to advance hybrid quantum computing for enterprises
QMware announces collaboration with NVIDIA and Oracle to advance hybrid quantum computing for enterprises

By combining QMware's expertise in quantum technology with Oracle's robust cloud infrastructure, we are scaling up quantum capabilities and simplifying its accessibility for businesses across all sectors.
